name: WF Error Alerts (stub)
note: Stub only — activate after wiring a workflow-logs write endpoint on the app. Documents the target pattern: Error Trigger → POST {NEXUS_APP_URL}/api/internal/n8n/workflow-logs with bootstrap token. Keep inactive until that route exists.

parameters.content:
## Nexus OS — Error Alerts (stub)

When a workflow fails, log structured context to `workflow_logs` **via the app** — never Supabase service-role.

Target (future): `POST {NEXUS_APP_URL}/api/internal/n8n/workflow-logs`
Bearer `N8N_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN`
Body: `{ team_id, workspace_id, workflow_name, step, result: 'error', error, payload }`

Keep **inactive** until the app endpoint ships. Then attach this workflow to production workflows via n8n Error Workflow settings.
